query:
SELECT b.id AS "id!", (
               SELECT bp.value_ref FROM block_properties bp
               JOIN blocks h ON h.id = bp.block_id AND h.deleted_at IS NULL
               WHERE bp.block_id = COALESCE(b.page_id, b.id) AND bp.key = 'space'
               LIMIT 1
           ) AS "space?"
           FROM blocks b
           WHERE b.deleted_at IS NULL
